entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop whose production is increasing in West Africa and is the subject of productivity simulation under climate change scenarios

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A semi-arid region where soybean production is being assessed for climate change impacts

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Projected changes in climate that impact the yield productivity and variability of crops

entities.name: YIELD PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of soybean output that is sensitive to climate change, carbon dioxide levels, and management practices

entities.name: DSSAT GROPGRO MODULE
entities.description: A simulation tool used to assess soybean productivity under historical and projected climate scenarios

entities.name: GENERAL CIRCULATION MODELS
entities.description: Models used to project climate scenarios for impact assessment

entities.name: REPRESENTATIVE CONCENTRATION PATHWAYS
entities.description: Scenarios (specifically 4.5 and 8.5) used to project future climate conditions

entities.name: NORTHERN GHANA
entities.description: The specific region in West Africa where a reduction in soybean productivity was observed due to climate change

entities.name: ELEVATED ATMOSPHERIC CARBON DIOXIDE
entities.description: An atmospheric condition that has the potential to offset the negative impacts of climate change on soybean productivity

entities.name: MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Cultural and strategic practices used by farmers that influence yield heterogeneity and resilience

entities.name: SOILS
entities.description: Soil profile data and differences that contribute to the heterogeneity of climate change impacts among farms

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of soybean productivity to withstand climate change, which can be enhanced by strategic management
